related_entity: Juniper

    line_eur: 14

Search/read evidence identified three matching bill records in 50_finance/purchases, each containing visible bill metadata and line items. I extracted those visible fields into required bill frontmatter per finance schema and kept the original body intact in each file; then deleted the inbox request per inbox-processing workflow.
